title: cynanchica pyrenaica subsp. occidentalis
intro: Cynanchica pyrenaica subsp. occidentalis, also known as the Western Mediterranean Cynanchica, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the Western Mediterranean Cynanchica is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
